Hero.subtitle: Registered Animal Welfare Philanthropic Association
Hero.explanation: WASP is a free platform that unites animal rights activists from all over the world. Our WASP CARD is a virtual card that joins the others in your phone and is only issued to those who are enrolled in (or are part of, in some way) any Animal Welfare Organization. In total anonymity and security, it gives you access to many services reserved only for true animal lovers. With this card you'll be part of the Animal Rights Movement together with people who think like you.
Hero.headline: ANIMAL RIGHTS ACTIVISTS OF THE WORLD, UNITE!
Hero.subheadline: ...with the virtual WASP card in your phone's wallet

MembershipForm.heading: Get your WASP Card (in 1 minute)

qrCode.caption: sign-up is only possible from a phone - scan the QR CODE with your phone if you're on a PC/Tablet

cta.text: IF YOU DON'T BELONG TO ANY ANIMAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION, SIGN UP FOR WASP (always 1 minute) AND GET YOUR WASP CARD RIGHT AWAY

mission.paragraph1: WASP is a safe platform that unites animal lovers from all over the world. We believe that by building a network of mutual solidarity with people who think like us, we can change the dominant culture that got us here. Spending our money consciously can be a winning strategy.
mission.paragraph2: For example: why buy products or services just anywhere? There are many businesses and shops that regularly donate to animals - if they offer the same goods and services, isn't it better to shop with them? Also, precisely because we're animal lovers, we might get special treatment! The Friends of Animals Map shows us the shops/businesses that donate to Animal Welfare Organizations... and they, if willing to offer special treatment to animal rights activists, will know we are one by seeing the WASP CARD!
mission.paragraph3: Our purchasing power is, indeed, a power... in fact, a SUPER POWER! Let's use it!

About.cta: BECOME A WASP AND HELP US

businessPitch.paragraph1: Ask your dentist or your trusted shop whether they've made a donation for animals. Often these donations are kept in the shadows, which is a shame, because businesses that donate to animals could be listed on the Friends Map FOR FREE... you just have to know about it!
businessPitch.paragraph2: If they haven't donated, convince them to become Friends of Animals. How? With numbers!

studies.heading: Recent <link>studies and one of our surveys</link> show that:
items: Over time, consumers have become more ethically attentive to how they spend their money.
The topics consumers care about most and are most sensitive to are: animal welfare and the environment.
Businesses that meet these growing market demands thrive.

About.callout: TO BECOME A FRIEND OF ANIMALS YOU NEED TO MAKE ANY DONATION (even 1 Euro) TO ANY ANIMAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION

friendsExplanation.paragraph1: Friends of Animals will be VISIBLE on the map for one year (after which they can renew their listing). Their donation makes them FRIENDS and will bring them new earnings in the form of new conscious customers. It benefits them (the businesses), it benefits us (consumers), and it benefits the animals (who will be the beneficiaries of this virtuous circle).
friendsExplanation.ps: P.S. In the future we'll make a ranking to honor the most virtuous WASPs!
friendsExplanation.movement: With your WASP card you're part of a Movement... in motion! It will be a long process, but sooner or later 'the market' will notice us conscious consumers, and then things will change. Shops, firms, and businesses will become (even if just out of opportunity) more generous with donations... but also more conscious. And that's the cultural change we want!

rules.heading: When you activate as a WASP, always remember these four things:
items: NEVER accept cash, all donations must be traceable (even 1 Euro ones). If you do, you will be permanently expelled from WASP.
The donation (of any amount equal to or greater than 1 Euro) can be made to any Animal Welfare Organization (registered with the National Registry - the full list is on our website) as well as to us.

If, in addition to the donation, the merchant, firm, or business commits to giving our members 'special treatment' (in any form), let us know so they can be identified differently on the map. They'll be Special Friends!
If the donation is made in favor of WASP, the donor should know that we don't withhold any amount for administrative costs, and the full sum will be dedicated entirely to animals.

Donation.heading: Make a donation
Donation.note: N.B. if you want to donate to a specific Animal Welfare Organization, you must specify it in the donation's 'notes', thank you.

pending.associationCta: We've already emailed your association, but the fastest way is for you to reach out to them directly and ask them to reply as soon as possible. The sooner they confirm, the sooner your card becomes permanent!

intro.paragraph1: We are a secular animal welfare philanthropic association registered [C.F. XXYY]
intro.paragraph2: We are the only Animal Welfare Organization in Italy that uses 100% of the donations received in favor of animals. We don't keep even 1 cent of donations to cover administrative or website management costs. Everything donated for animals goes exclusively to animals.
intro.paragraph3: We don't collect or transmit data. Our website and WASP CARD have no advertising.

1.question: Why is getting a card from an Animal Welfare Organization free, while getting one directly from WASP costs 2 Euros?
1.answer: The card is only for animal lovers. If you're part of an Animal Welfare Organization, it means you've already given something to animals, and we recognize that, so we don't ask for anything. We're honored to have you on our side.

2.question: How will my 2 Euros be used (for those who don't belong to other Animal Welfare Organizations)?
2.answer: 1 Euro will be allocated to donations (minimum amount). 1 Euro represents a nominal fee that helps us distinguish those who truly believe in this project from those who would only do it to benefit from many free services. We'll use the second Euro to cover server and software expenses (the first will go to animals).

Missione.title: Our Mission
Missione.missionStatement: Wasps are everywhere... individually they are irrelevant; but a swarm of wasps can change an entire ecosystem. We animal lovers should learn from wasps and unite to try to change our ecosystem [understood as an ECOnomic system, not ECOlogical], that is, the one based on the exploitation of every form of animal life, inflicting suffering and death on those below us in the food chain. This is why we are wasps (WASPs)... our swarm can make the difference!

philosophy.paragraph1: WASP is not in competition with other Animal Welfare Organizations for funds, donations, goods, or volunteer staff. We want to cooperate, not compete. This is why we chose not to participate in 5x1000 fundraising. Rather, we believe there is a need for a 'cultural revolution' to truly change things.
philosophy.paragraph2: We're trying to create the conditions for this to happen using the same tools that dictate market laws: supply and demand. With our purchasing power we could make a difference simply by making ethical choices. For example, rewarding all activities that demonstrate care for animal welfare.

1.title: Make the (global) Animal Rights Movement more functional and efficient
1.description: WASP is a platform that aims to bring together everything that revolves around the Animal Rights World. Not just Organizations and individuals, but also data and information that, being scattered across the internet, would be very difficult to have at hand.

2.title: Facilitate communication and cooperation between Animal Welfare Organizations
2.description: The global events calendar, news, and the card in the Wallet are just some of the tools we share with the entire Animal Rights World to promote unity and cooperation between individual subjects and Organizations within the Movement for the protection and safeguarding of animals.

3.title: Create an 'invisible' but tangible alliance among all those who care about animals
3.description: We firmly believe in the power of 'conscious spending' which, over time, could establish itself as a very effective tool for modifying how supply and demand for goods and services evolve. By conscious spending we mean making choices aimed at rewarding shops, firms, and businesses that are close to and donate resources to animals.

4.title: Offer information services of various levels
4.description: In addition to the services mentioned above, there are others of an operational nature that deserve to be mentioned. Our card allows us to reach one or a group of registered members by sending them a notification directly on their card. For example, in case of an emergency situation where we need to quickly gather all available volunteers. We also have a bulletin board where all Animal Welfare Organizations can display their projects and attract larger memberships.

5.title: Cultivate a global community of animal rights activists on a completely safe and reliable platform
5.description: Our card allows all members to access a chat service reserved only for those with our card. This 'enclosure' makes the chat experience completely safe because (although everyone is covered by the anonymity of their Nickname) they are still individuals who belong to the Animal Rights Movement and, if needed, can be traced.

6.title: Encourage cross-pollination
6.description: Contact (through integrated chat and beyond) between animal rights activists from different and global Organizations promotes the technical and cultural enrichment of individuals, but also that of their respective associations, making the Animal Rights Movement stronger and more resilient.

7.title: Emancipate the Animal Rights Movement through recognition and awareness
7.description: With the WASP card, the individual will enjoy a sense of belonging and by activating as a WASP [that is, by being more 'conscious' in spending and involving the firms they know to donate], they would be an integral and proactive part of this ambitious initiative.

8.title: Provide Animal Welfare Organizations with new fundraising tools
8.description: By distributing WASP cards to their members/volunteers/associates/staff, etc., Animal Welfare Organizations would benefit from any donations their registered members manage to collect. Even if donations are directed to us, if they were procured by a member of Organization XYZ, we will transfer that entire donation to the coffers of XYZ.

9.title: Raise funds for projects carried out by Animal Welfare Organizations
9.description: Donations made to WASP will be allocated to other Animal Welfare Organizations since it's unlikely we'll be able to set up a better project than those who've been doing them all along.

10.title: Keep our administrative costs to a minimum
10.description: WASP is essentially a 'virtual' initiative that offers quality (free) intangible services. We don't manage a domestic animal shelter, so our daily operating costs are lower, which allows us to withhold nothing from donations and transfer all value received in favor of the real beneficiaries: animals.

Bilancio.title: Financial Reports
Bilancio.transparencyStatement: For us, transparency is a non-negotiable measure of trust, which is why we don't accept cash donations. All transactions must be transparent and traceable, even the smallest ones.
Bilancio.documentsDescription: Download our annual financial report to verify how we use every euro received.
Bilancio.explanation: Our accounts are public and verifiable. Every donation received is tracked and used exclusively to support animal welfare organizations and their projects.

Sponsors.title: Sponsors
Sponsors.explanation: Sponsors are not donors, they are patrons who voluntarily contribute to covering the direct expenses of our Association (e.g., server costs, digital equipment, software updates, etc.). Once all direct expenses are covered, excess funds (coming from sponsors) can be transferred to donations or kept in cash reserves to cover the following year's operating expenses.

bankDetails.important: PLEASE SPECIFY IN THE MEMO THAT THIS IS A 'SPONSORSHIP' and not a donation, thank you.

Sponsors.noSponsorsYet: We currently have no registered sponsors. If you'd like to support WASP as a sponsor, please use the bank details above.
